title: China Just Built A Two Brain AI Robot: One Body, Two Minds
summary: A video commentary on recent humanoid robot announcements including China's JAKA Pi with split AI brain architecture, Vietnam's Dyno and VR-H3 models, and NVIDIA's Isaac GR00T platform. The narrative frames humanoid robotics as transitioning from demos to deployable systems for industrial and domestic use.
